params.defaultPlatformFeeBps_: Default platform fee in basis points

params.token: The ERC20 token address to use for payment (swapped to USDC)

getOrCreateWallet(address).details: Used by ChilizSwapRouter to ensure a wallet exists before recording

returns._0: wallet The wallet address (address(0) if not deployed)

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

setImplementation(address).details: Does NOT affect already-deployed wallets. Use upgradeWallet() to migrate      existing wallets individually after validating the new implementation.

params.newImplementation: Address of the new StreamWallet implementation contract

params.newFeeBps: The new fee in basis points

params.token: The ERC20 token address to use for payment (swapped to USDC)

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

upgradeWallet(address,address).details: Only callable by the factory owner. StreamWallet._authorizeUpgrade enforces      that only the factory contract can initiate upgrades, preventing streamers      from self-upgrading to malicious implementations.

params.streamer: The streamer whose wallet to upgrade

constructor.notice: Initialize the factory and deploy implementation

deployWalletFor(address).notice: Manually deploy a wallet for a streamer (admin only)

donateToStream(address,string,uint256,ui.notice: Send a donation to a streamer (creates wallet if needed)

getOrCreateWallet(address).notice: Get or create a StreamWallet for a streamer

getWallet(address).notice: Get the wallet address for a streamer

hasWallet(address).notice: Check if a streamer has a wallet

implementation().notice: Get the implementation address used for new wallet deployments

setImplementation(address).notice: Update the StreamWallet implementation used for all future proxy deployments

setKayenRouter(address).notice: Update the Kayen DEX router address

setSwapRouter(address).notice: Update the authorized swap router address

streamWalletImplementation().notice: Current StreamWallet implementation used for new proxy deployments.

subscribeToStream(address,uint256,uint25.notice: Subscribe to a streamer (creates wallet if needed)

upgradeWallet(address,address).notice: Upgrade a streamer's StreamWallet to a new implementation (platform admin only)
